description: This steel rectangular dial watch from maxima with classically minimalist styling and roman numbers, is built with precision quartz movement for accuracy, making it as hard-wearing as it is stylish.  Case diameter: 28 mm Case thickness: 9 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Warranty: 1 Year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfort Ssteele logo on the 12 hour mark Date aperture at the 12-hour mark Steel bracelet with a butterfly clasp Off white dial with quartz movement Screw to reset time Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters - wearable while washing hands and in mild rain Comes in an authentic Maxima tin case
